hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.env"'; then echo 'BLOCKED: .env is protected. Edit .env.example instead.' && exit 1; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(routes|models|app)\.py'; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && FLASK_APP=app.py ENVIRONMENT=testing venv/bin/python -c "from app import create_app; app = create_app('testing'); print('Smoke test OK')" 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
